_comment: Starter corpus for a top-level skill. 'target' must match the skill's SKILL.md frontmatter 'name'. List prompts that SHOULD activate this skill under 'positive' and prompts that should NOT under 'negative' (e.g. requests that belong to other skills). Aim for 8-10 per side; 4 is the minimum. Optional 'min_precision'/'min_recall' override the CLI thresholds. Run: python scripts/evaluate_descriptions.py <corpus-dir> --skill-set <dir-containing-the-skill>
positive: Create a new skill that validates JSON files
How do I scaffold a capability
Audit my skill system for consistency
Bundle this skill as a zip
negative: Help me write a Python web scraper
